html:
The Green Gem is an item used to craft two Ancient items. It can be used to craft the Construction Amulet, which raises Sanity as well as halves the resource cost of crafting items, and the Deconstruction Staff, which can be used to destroy structures/items and receive all of the resources used in their construction (barring Gems).

Gathering

Green Gems can be obtained by mining Ancient Statues, destroying Broken Clockworks, breaking certain Relics, opening Ornate Chests, and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations in the Ruins.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Green Gems have a 0.02% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds.

In the Hamlet DLC, there is a very low chance for Green Gems to drop by hammering Smashing Pots.

Usage

×3

×2

×2

×2

×4

Tips

In the Reign of Giants DLC, because Green Gems are somewhat renewable, the items it can be crafted into can be utilized to make nearly any other item in the game renewable, by crafting something with the amulet at half-price and then deconstructing it with the Deconstruction Staff for a full return.

Trivia

  • The Green Gem uses the Red Gem's texture, only flipped and coloured green.

Gallery

  • Gems emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

"greengem"
“It's green and gemmy.”
–Wilson
“This one feels really light.”
–Willow
“Is pretty and not be crushed. Like me!”
–Wolfgang
“The flaws are its most beautiful features.”
–Wendy
“PRESSURE AND IMPURITIES HAVE PRODUCED PLEASING PERFECTION”
–WX-78
“Chromium impurities have colored this gem green.”
–Wickerbottom
“How flashy.”
–Woodie
“The nightmare fuel will unlock its true potential.”
–Maxwell
“Geometric optics at work.”
–Wagstaff
“An emerald stöne.”
–Wigfrid
“I'm absolutely green with envy.”
–Webber
“The color of nature!”
–Walani
“Ahh, a rare attraction!”
–Warly
“Emerald treasures.”
–Woodlegs
“ALL THAT GLITTERS IS'T GOLD!”
–Wilba
“Looks familiar...”
–Wormwood
“Sparkly thing. Typically a good sign you're on an adventure.”
–Wheeler
“Now that's a proper gem.”
–Winona
“Gentlest green from lush vales gleaned.”
–Wortox
“Like this stone, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's a great green gem!”
–Walter
“If only I could've gotten my hands on one of these before... well never mind.”
–Wanda
